errors.invalid_settings_format: Invalid MCP settings JSON format. Please ensure your settings follow the correct JSON format.
errors.invalid_settings_syntax: Invalid MCP settings JSON format. Please check your settings file for syntax errors.
errors.failed_update_project: Failed to update project MCP servers
errors.invalidJsonArgument: Zoo tried to use {{toolName}} with an invalid JSON argument. Retrying...
errors.refresh_after_disable: Failed to refresh MCP connections after disabling
errors.refresh_after_enable: Failed to refresh MCP connections after enabling
errors.disconnect_servers_partial: Failed to disconnect {{count}} MCP server(s). Check the output for details.
errors.toolNotFound: Tool '{{toolName}}' does not exist on server '{{serverName}}'. Available tools: {{availableTools}}
errors.serverNotFound: MCP server '{{serverName}}' is not configured. Available servers: {{availableServers}}
errors.toolDisabled: Tool '{{toolName}}' on server '{{serverName}}' is disabled. Available enabled tools: {{availableTools}}

info.all_refreshed: All MCP servers have been refreshed.
info.project_config_deleted: Project MCP configuration file deleted. All project MCP servers have been disconnected.

callback.title: OAuth Callback - Zoo Code
callback.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check the MCP server logs.
callback.auth_success: MCP server authenticated successfully. You can now close this browser tab.
callback.tab_closing_in: This tab will attempt to close in {{count}}s...
callback.safe_to_close: If the tab did not close, you can safely close it manually.

flow.clickAuthenticate: MCP server "{{name}}" is waiting for authentication.
flow.dismissedHint: Notification dismissed — cancel and reconnect the server to re-authenticate.
flow.connected: MCP server "{{name}}" connected successfully after OAuth authentication.
